title: bidens leucanthema var. pilosa
intro: Bidens leucanthema var. pilosa is a rare variety of the Bidens leucanthema plant, commonly known as the hairy biddens or the white beggar's lice, a plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens leucanthema var. pilosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Bidens leucanthema var. pilosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
